events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** at **high risk** — undersized conductors for the actual load violate NEC Table 310.16 ampacity requirements (fire/overheat hazard), and failing to account for run length skips the standard voltage-drop check (3%/5% guidance under 210.19(A)/215.2(A)). Sizing to breaker rating alone without checking load current, derating, and distance is a common shortcut, not acceptable practice — correction (recalculate and repull before termination) is required before the work can proceed to inspection.
